backstory.original: From a scion of a famed Baldurian house to a life of adventure on the road, Wyll's life as the monster hunter called the Blade of Frontiers has made him one of the beating hearts of the Sword Coast. While he has done great deeds for the Coast's people, the source of his power remains secret. The cambion Mizora drew Wyll into a warlock's pact in a moment with many lives at stake, and cursed him with the duty of hunting her enemies. Mizora only asks Wyll to sacrifice devilish creatures to her, but a cambion's ambitions are ever fickle, and Wyll wishes to escape the pact before its price grows cruel.
backstory.display: 从声名显赫的博德人家族后裔，到颠沛流离的冒险家——威尔被称为“前线之刃”，怪物猎人的生活使他成为剑湾的重要人物之一。尽管为剑湾做出过伟大贡献，他的力量来源却始终成谜。在众多生命危在旦夕之际，魔裔米佐拉引诱威尔签订了邪术师的契约，使他背负上为她追杀敌人的诅咒。米佐拉只要求威尔献祭魔鬼生物，但魔裔的心思向来变化无常，所以威尔期望着能在代价越来越残酷之前摆脱这份契约。

description.original: Wyll stabs the closest foe, then casts Eldritch Blast on the lowest health enemy.
description.display: 威尔戳刺最近的敌人，随后对生命值最低的敌人施放魔能爆弹。

description.original: Mizora causes Wyll to attack faster and deal ultimate damage for 15 seconds.
description.display: 米佐拉令瓦尔更迅速地进行攻击并造成杀招伤害，持续 15 秒。

longDescription.original: Wyll's patron Mizora appears behind him for 15 seconds, increasing his attack rate and making him deal ultimate damage for the duration.
longDescription.display: 赞助者米佐拉出现在瓦尔的背后，提高瓦尔的攻击速度并令他造成杀招伤害，持续 15 秒。

description.original: Wyll increases the damage of Champions that belong to the most represented race, class, or affiliation(s).
description.display: 威尔为阵型中最具代表性种族、职业或从属组织的勇士提升伤害。

description.original: Fiends are Wyll's Favored Foes and he increases the damage of all Champions when attacking them
description.display: 炼狱生物是威尔的偏好对手，且威尔会提升所有勇士在攻击炼狱生物时的伤害。

description.desc: Wyll increases the damage of all Champions that belong to the most represented species, class, or affiliation(s) in the formation by $(amount)%. If there is a tie, all tied groups gain the buff, and Champions who are part of several groups can gain multiple stacks of the buff (up to a max of $(max_stacks___2) stacks), stacking multiplicatively. Buffs apply to the pre-stack value.
威尔为阵型中最具代表性种族、职业或从属组织的所有勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害。如果存在相同团队，所有相同团体均会获得增益，而这些团体中的勇士可获得复数堆叠的增益（最高 $(max_stacks___2) 层堆叠），以乘算方式堆叠。增益作用于堆叠前的数值。

conditions.desc: ^^最具代表性^种族：$(most_common_race)^职业：$(most_common_class)^从属组织：$(most_common_affiliation)

tipText.original: Wyll increases the damage of Champions that belong to the most represented species, class, or affiliation(s).
tipText.display: 威尔为阵型中最具代表性种族、职业或从属组织的勇士提升伤害。

description.desc: Your formation gains one Ceremorphosis stack due to the mind flayer tadpole in Wyll's brain. Wyll increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id___2) by $(amount)% for each Ceremorphosis stack, stacking multiplicatively.
威尔大脑中的夺心魔蝌蚪使你的阵型获得一层“蜕变”堆叠。每层“蜕变”均使威尔 $(upgrade_name id___2) 的效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
$(sources_favored_foe_list_and fiend) are Wyll's Favored Foes. All Champions deal $(amount)% more damage against Wyll's Favored Foes.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target does $amount% more damage against Wyll's Favored Foes

description.desc: $(sources_favored_foe_list_and fiend)是威尔的偏好对手。所有勇士对威尔的偏好对手造成 $(amount)% 额外伤害

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target 对威尔的偏好对手造成 $amount% 额外伤害

tipText.original: Fiends are Wyll's Favored Foes and all Champions deal increased damage to them
tipText.display: 炼狱生物是威尔的偏好对手，所有勇士对这些敌人造成更高伤害

description.desc: Each time an enemy or distraction is defeated, Wyll increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively up to $(max_stacks) times, until the area changes.
每次击败敌人或干扰物，威尔提升$(upgrade_name id)的效果 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠最多 $(max_stacks) 层，持续到区域更改为止。
Wyll increases the effect of $(upgrade_name upgrade_id) by $(amount)% on Champions with a Melee base attack.
威尔令使用近战基本攻击的勇士身上的$(upgrade_name upgrade_id)效果提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Wyll focuses on his blade and empowers his allies with a Melee attack.
specializationDescription.display: 威尔集中精力到自己的利刃，为自己的盟友提供近战攻击强化。

description.desc: Wyll increases the effect of Folk Hero by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Familiar assigned to his party, stacking multiplicatively.
每个分配到自己队伍的魔宠均使威尔的“民间英雄”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Wyll's abilities increase with the number of Familiars assigned to the party.
specializationDescription.display: 威尔的技能根据队伍中配备的魔宠获得提升。

description.desc: Wyll increases the effect of Folk Hero by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a Magic base attack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位魔法基本攻击的勇士，均使威尔的“民间英雄”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Wyll's magic strengthens with each ally that has a Magical attack.
specializationDescription.display: 威尔的魔法会随使用魔法攻击的盟友人数增加而得到强化。

description.original: I'd give my life to protect the frontiers. Some say I've already given more.
description.display: 我会将自己的人生奉献给便将。有人说，我已经给予出了更难多。

description.original: It's not the blade you wield that matters. It's the people you defend with it.
description.display: 重要的不是你佩带的利刃。而是你用利刃保护着的人。

description.original: The only way we'll survive is by working together.
description.display: 我们活下去的唯一办法就是通力合作。

description.original: They will tell our story up and down the Sword Coast!
description.display: 他们会在整个剑湾传诵我们的故事！

description.original: Something's lurking in my mind. I can feel it.
description.display: 有东西潜伏在我脑子里。我能感觉得到。

description.original: Those visions... did you see them too?
description.display: 那些幻像……你们也看到了吗？

description.original: I must do what my patron demands. That is all I can say.
description.display: 我必须做我赞助者要求的事情。我能说的就这些。

description.original: One day, all Baldurians will know the Blade of Frontiers!
description.display: 总有一天，所有博德人都会知道“前线之刃”的大名！

description.original: Listen - the bards sing of my legend!
description.display: 听啊——吟游诗人在歌唱我的传奇！

description.original: With this power, nothing can stand in my way.
description.display: 有此等力量，我将无人可挡。

description.original: Nothing with a heart - that was the deal.
description.display: 禁止有心，立此为约。

description.original: Wretched things. I'll be your end!
description.display: 可怜的东西。我会是你的末日！

description.original: We're being followed. I can feel it.
description.display: 我们被人跟踪了。我能感觉得到。

description.original: Not all my skills are gifts from the Hells.
description.display: 我的本事，可不都是来自地狱的赠礼。

description.original: 'Quite the handsome devil, if I do say so.' ~ Mizora
description.display: “要我说的话，那还真是个英俊的魔鬼。”——米佐拉

description.original: He is our shield, as I am his blade. Together, we protect the people of Baldur's Gate.
description.display: 他是我们的盾牌，我是他的利刃。我们一起保护博德之门的人民。

description.original: I feel its power awakening within, and I sense Mizora's growing terror.
description.display: 我能感觉到它的力量正在体内苏醒，也察觉到米佐拉正越来越恐惧。

character_sheet_details.backstory: From a scion of a famed Baldurian house to a life of adventure on the road, Wyll's life as the monster hunter called the Blade of Frontiers has made him one of the beating hearts of the Sword Coast. While he has done great deeds for the Coast's people, the source of his power remains secret. The cambion Mizora drew Wyll into a warlock's pact in a moment with many lives at stake, and cursed him with the duty of hunting her enemies. Mizora only asks Wyll to sacrifice devilish creatures to her, but a cambion's ambitions are ever fickle, and Wyll wishes to escape the pact before its price grows cruel.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Wyll is a human warlock that supports Champions belonging to the most represented species, class, or affiliation in the formation.

event_upgrades.name: Folk Hero
event_upgrades.description: Wyll increases the damage of Champions that belong to the most represented race, class, or affiliation(s).

event_upgrades.name: A Heartless Contract
event_upgrades.description: Fiends are Wyll's Favored Foes and he increases the damage of all Champions when attacking them

character_sheet_details.backstory: 从声名显赫的博德人家族后裔，到颠沛流离的冒险家——威尔被称为“前线之刃”，怪物猎人的生活使他成为剑湾的重要人物之一。尽管为剑湾做出过伟大贡献，他的力量来源却始终成谜。在众多生命危在旦夕之际，魔裔米佐拉引诱威尔签订了邪术师的契约，使他背负上为她追杀敌人的诅咒。米佐拉只要求威尔献祭魔鬼生物，但魔裔的心思向来变化无常，所以威尔期望着能在代价越来越残酷之前摆脱这份契约。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 威尔是一个人类邪术师，支援阵型中具有最具代表性的种族、职业或从属组织的勇士。

event_upgrades.name: 民间英雄
event_upgrades.description: 威尔为阵型中最具代表性种族、职业或从属组织的勇士提升伤害。

event_upgrades.name: 无情的契约
event_upgrades.description: 炼狱生物是威尔的偏好对手，且威尔会提升所有勇士在攻击炼狱生物时的伤害。

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领

display.name: 团队精神

display.name: 可怖存在
display.description: 有东西潜伏在我脑子里。我能感觉得到。

original.name: Illithid Connection
original.description: Those visions... did you see them too?

display.name: 灵吸怪联结
display.description: 那些幻像……你们也看到了吗？

original.name: Fulfilling the Pact
original.description: I must do what my patron demands. That is all I can say.

display.name: 履行契约
display.description: 我必须做我赞助者要求的事情。我能说的就这些。

display.name: 成为传奇
display.description: 总有一天，所有博德人都会知道“前线之刃”的大名！

original.name: Near Myth

display.name: 近乎神话
display.description: 听啊——吟游诗人在歌唱我的传奇！

original.name: Mizora's Chosen
original.description: With this power, nothing can stand in my way.

display.name: 米佐拉精英
display.description: 有此等力量，我将无人可挡。

original.name: The Heartless
original.description: Nothing with a heart - that was the deal.

original.name: The Soulless
original.description: Wretched things. I'll be your end!

display.name: 无魂者
display.description: 可怜的东西。我会是你的末日！

original.name: Distracting Imps
original.description: We're being followed. I can feel it.

display.name: 分心的小魔鬼
display.description: 我们被人跟踪了。我能感觉得到。

original.name: Athlete
original.description: Not all my skills are gifts from the Hells.

display.name: 运动员
display.description: 我的本事，可不都是来自地狱的赠礼。

original.name: Mizora's Pawn
original.description: 'Quite the handsome devil, if I do say so.' ~ Mizora

display.name: 米佐拉的棋子
display.description: “要我说的话，那还真是个英俊的魔鬼。”——米佐拉

original.name: Duke's Pride
original.description: He is our shield, as I am his blade. Together, we protect the people of Baldur's Gate.

display.name: 公爵的自尊
display.description: 他是我们的盾牌，我是他的利刃。我们一起保护博德之门的人民。

original.name: Psychic Link
original.description: I feel its power awakening within, and I sense Mizora's growing terror.

display.name: 精神联系
display.description: 我能感觉到它的力量正在体内苏醒，也察觉到米佐拉正越来越恐惧。
